reviews.comment:
Antes de realizar la carga pregunté si cobraban con tarjeta de crédito y débito, me contestaron que sí. Realicé la carga y cuando entregué mi tarjeta para que me cobren, no lo pudieron hacer porque no funcionaba el sistema de tarjetas. Tuve que conseguir efvo y pagar, con la perdida de tiempo e inconvenientes.

(Translated by Google)
Before topping up my account, I asked if they accepted credit and debit cards, and they said yes. I topped up my account, but when I handed over my card to be charged, they couldn't process the payment because the card system wasn't working. I had to get cash and pay, which wasted my time and caused me a lot of inconvenience.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12844074835254669240/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBZ05leWxRRRAB
